ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contigs" (
  "contig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contig */,
  "plasmid_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of the contig being a plasmid */,
  "chrom_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of the contig being a chromosome */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the contig (e.g., chromosome, plasmid, unlabeled) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the contig */,
  "chr_coverage" INTEGER /* Coverage of the contig on the chromosome */,
  "pl_coverage" INTEGER /* Coverage of the contig on a plasmid */,
  "un_coverage" INTEGER /* Coverage of the contig on unmapped regions */,
  "hybrid_mapsto" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the contig is a hybrid that maps to multiple locations */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the genome assembly */,
  "assembly_date" TEXT /* Date when the assembly was created */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the species */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the research project */,
  "gene_count" INTEGER /* Number of genes predicted on the contig */,
  "functional_annotation" TEXT /* Functional annotations of the contig */,
  "mapped_location" TEXT /* Specific chromosomal or plasmid location the contig maps to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assembly */,
  "assembly_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly */,
  "assembly_date" TEXT /* Date when the assembly was created */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the species */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the gene */,
  "contig_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the contig */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the contig */,
  "gene_end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the contig */,
  "gene_strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "contig_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the contig */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., functional, structural) */,
  "annotation_details" TEXT /* Details of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id")
)
